title: myriopus volubilis
intro: Myriopus volubilis, also known as creeping sage or California sage, is a type of perennial herb that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Myriopus volubilis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
